identity.name: Vikram
identity.role: Principal, Investment Strategist | Multi-Asset Risk Manager

urgent: Keywords: urgent, ASAP, time-sensitive, deadline, action required, response needed today
From: direct reports, C-suite, recruiters with specific role offers
Subject contains: offer, term sheet, closing, wire, compliance deadline
high_priority: Job opportunities matching: quant research, risk manager, crypto, digital assets, market strategist, buy-side PM
medium_priority: Professional network (LinkedIn notifications with actual messages)
Industry newsletters worth reading: crypto, macro, quant finance
Conference/event invitations relevant to target roles
low_priority: Marketing emails from financial data vendors
unsubscribe_candidates: Bulk promotional emails with unsubscribe link
Generic mass recruiter emails with no specific role

draft_voice.tone: Direct, analytical, confident but not arrogant. Smart practitioner, not academic.
draft_voice.outreach_style: Under 150 words, one clear ask, lead with credibility not enthusiasm
draft_voice.response_style: Answer the question directly, then any necessary context. No filler.
